name: Math Multiply
python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    a = float(inputs.get('a', 1.0))
    b = float(inputs.get('b', 1.0))
    res = a * b
    self.log_info(f"Multiplying {a} * {b} = {res}")
    
    await self.set_output('result', res)
    await self.set_output("exec_out", True)
    return {'result': res}
